2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 57
Date 04 July 2026
Time 18:15
Title Infringement - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed GBR DOC 57 - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times.pdf
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury

 
 
 
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 – 05 July 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 57 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  04 July 2026 
 
        Time  18:15 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 3, 7, 9, 13 and 17. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 3 55  Carlos Sainz Atlassian Williams F1 Team 16:02:18 1:33.460 
2 9 14  Fernando Alonso Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 16:03:35 PIT 
3 7 63 George Russell Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 16:07:12 PIT 
4 13 43 Franco Colapinto BWT Alpine F1 Team 16:16:56 PIT 
5 17 14 Fernando Alonso Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 16:18:42 1:32.888 
6 13 27 Nico Hulkenberg Audi Rev
